MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-01-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Albert Murolo is present.
Attorney, Daniel Bornstein, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Edward Yip, is present.
Attorney, Larry Becker , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Amanda Ebey, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-07-2010 is vacated.
